title: Act II - The Archive Hunt
summary: Ada follows mythic and historical rhymes, discovers the Edgar Potter corpus, and realizes that the hidden model predates her by decades.

narrative.newInfo: Ancient world-tree motifs map to structural timeline language, not only mythology.
narrative.dripHook: Potter's posthumous documents imply engineered disappearance, not death.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Act I uncertainty shifts into a searchable model.
narrative.beautyHooks: Myth and measurement begin carrying the same geometry.
